title: lomatium andrusianum
intro: Lomatium andrusianum, also known as Grey Pinedrops, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and southwestern Canada, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are found in its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Lomatium andrusianum include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Lomatium andrusianum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
